publications.ref: Wingo TS, Duong DM, Zhou M, Dammer EB, Wu H, Cutler DJ, Lah JJ, Levey AI, Seyfried NT. Integrating Next-Generation Genomic Sequencing and Mass Spectrometry to Estimate Allele-Specific Protein Abundance in Human Brain. J Proteome Res. 2017 Jul 10

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: we performed high-resolution mass spectrometry-based proteomics for two human post-mortem brain samples

Characteristics[Label].reasoning: 論文では'label-free ion intensity measurements'と'heavy labeled peptides standards coupled with parallel reaction monitoring (PRM)'の両方が言及されている
Characteristics[Label].needs: メイン実験での標識法と検証実験での標識法の区別を明確化

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: ヒト死後脳組織サンプルを用いた高解像度MSベースのプロテオミクス実験であることが確定。2つのサンプルを解析し、label-free定量と重標識ペプチド標準によるPRM検証を実施。疾患状態や細胞株に関する情報は言及なし。標識法の詳細は要確認。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].1.evidence: Samples were first digested with 1:200 (w/w) lysyl endopeptidase (LysC; Wako) at 37°C for 4 h

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: followed by 5 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) at 37°C for 30 min

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: Protein samples (1 mg) were treated with 1 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) at 37°C for 30 min

Characteristics[Label].evidence: Label-free Quantification of Allele-Specific Abundance section describes XIC-based quantification without labeling

Characteristics[Modification].evidence: dynamic modifications for oxidized Met (+15.9949 Da)

Characteristics[Modification].3.evidence: static modification for carbamidomethyl Cys (+57.0215 Da)

Characteristics[SyntheticPeptide].evidence: The heavy isotope labeled peptides were purchased from ThermoFisher Scientific (AQUA-Basic)

Comment[FractionationMethod].evidence: Electrostatic Repulsion-Hydrophilic Interaction Chromatography (ERLIC) fractionation was performed

Comment[NumberOfFractions].evidence: The 40 fractions were pooled into 20 fractions by combining in the following manner

Comment[Separation].evidence: peptide eluents were separated on a self-packed C18 (1.9 um Dr. Maisch, Germany) fused silica column

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: サンプル調製は標準的なプロトコルでDTT還元、IAアルキル化後、LysC前消化とtrypsin主消化の二段階消化を実施。label-free定量にERLIC分画(40→20画分)とRP-LC分離を使用。4種の修飾(酸化、脱アミド、アセチル化、カルバミドメチル化)を検索パラメータに設定。検証用にAQUA合成ペプチドを使用してPRM解析も実施。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: monitored on an Thermo Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer (ThermoFisher Scientific)

Comment[FragmentationMethod].evidence: All HCD MS/MS spectra were acquired at a resolution of 17,500

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: The mass spectrometer cycle was programmed to sequence at top speed with a cycle time of 5 sec

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].evidence: mass tolerance of precursor ions (±10 ppm)

Comment[FragmentMassTolerance].evidence: 0.05 Da mass tolerance for product ions

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: Elution was performed over a 120-min gradient

Comment[IonizationType].reasoning: アンカー情報でnanoESIが示されているが、論文テキストでは明示的な記載がない。装置構成からnanoESIが妥当
Comment[IonizationType].needs: 論文内でのイオン化法の明示的な記載確認

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].reasoning: アンカー情報でorbitrapが示されており、HCD MS/MS spectraがOrbitrapで取得されていることから妥当
Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].needs: 論文内での明示的な記載確認

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: 質量分析装置・設定パラメータは大部分が確定。メイン装置はThermo Orbitrap Fusion、HCD断片化、30%衝突エネルギー、プリカーサー質量許容誤差±10ppm、フラグメント質量許容誤差0.05Da、最大ミスクリーベージ数2、LC勾配120分、流速300nl/minが確定。イオン化法とMS2質量分析器はアンカー情報との整合性確認が必要。

Comment[FractionIdentifier].evidence: Forty fractions were collected... The 40 fractions were pooled into 20 fractions by combining in the following manner, (1, 40); (2, 39); (3, 38), and so on. An equal volume of each of the 20 ERLIC peptide fractions (LysC or trypsin) was re-suspended

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: We obtained fresh-frozen post-mortem human brain (dorsolateral prefrontal cortex; broadman area 9) from two cases from the Emory Brain Bank. Each tissue sample was processed as described

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: We obtained fresh-frozen post-mortem human brain (dorsolateral prefrontal cortex; broadman area 9) from two cases from the Emory Brain Bank

Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.evidence: For samples digested with both LysC and trypsin... For samples digested with only LysC... の記述から、各サンプルで2つの異なる酵素消化条件（LysC+Trypsin、LysC only）でテクニカルレプリケートを実施

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].evidence: 2つの生物学的レプリケート × 2つのテクニカルレプリケート（酵素消化条件）= 4つのrawファイル

FactorValue[FractionIdentifier].reasoning: ERLIC分画により各サンプルが20画分に分けられているが、FactorValueとして扱うかComment[FractionIdentifier]のみで十分かは文脈依存
FactorValue[FractionIdentifier].needs: 実験デザインにおけるfraction identifierの役割の明確化

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: 2つの生物学的レプリケート（e0590、OS02252）からそれぞれ2つのテクニカルレプリケート（LysC+Trypsin、LysC only消化）で計4つのrawファイルを取得。各サンプルはERLIC分画により20画分に分離されている。治療条件や疾患状態などの実験因子は設定されていない基礎的なプロテオーム解析実験。ファイル名から生物学的レプリケートと消化条件が明確に識別可能。
